meta.title: Jai Singh | Full Stack Developer & ML Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Jai Singh — Full Stack Developer, AI/ML Engineer, and DevOps Learner. Projects, skills, experience, and contact details.

about.name: Jai Singh
about.role: Full Stack Developer | Machine Learning Engineer | AI Enthusiast
about.bio: Computer Science Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. Strong experience in full stack web development and hands-on expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and deploying AI-powered applications.

experience.description: Built scalable full-stack modules using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. Designed optimized database schemas, integrated REST APIs, implemented AI-powered chatbot features, and collaborated in an agile team using Git/GitHub.

Developed reusable UI components using React and TypeScript. Integrated Storybook for component documentation and visual testing. Enhanced the Slot feature to support dynamic custom components within the design system.

projects.description: ML-based system recommending optimal crops using soil and weather data.

projects.description: Regression-based ML model to predict housing prices with high accuracy.
